case_title: JOSELITO N. SANTOS VS. EFREN D. LUNAR

docket_entries.description: NOTICE TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR FILED BY THE PLAINTIFF OPPOSING TO ACCEPT INSTALLMENT PAYMENT.
ORDER "GRANTED" ON JUDGEMENT DEBTOR'S REQUEST TO ENTER SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,991.00 FILED BY SANTOS, JOSELITO N. AS TO DEFENDANT LUNAR, EFREN D. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-17-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY DEFENDANT LUNAR, EFREN D. HEARING SET FOR JAN-02-2009 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DEBTOR'S REQUEST FOR SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, SUBMITTED TO JUDGE. FILED BY DEFENDANT LUNAR, EFREN D.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $0.00) SERVED AUG-28-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LUNAR, EFREN D.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-17-2008 - JUDGMENT.

MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY EFREN D. LUNAR SET FOR JAN-02-2009 IS CONTINUED TO JAN-08-2009 AT 11:00 AM IN 506. PARTIES ARE ORDERED TO APPEAR FOR ORDER OF EXAMINATION DEFENDANT SHALL APPEAR WITH FINANCIAL DOCUMENTS INCLUDING BANK STATEMENTS OF INCOME AND EXPENSES, AND TITLE INFORMATION FOR VEHICLES AND PROPERTY. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-17-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-17-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF'S TELEPHONE NUMBER CHANGE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF SANTOS, JOSELITO N.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT LUNAR, EFREN D.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SANTOS, JOSELITO N. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LUNAR, EFREN D. $4,250.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,300.00, DEFENDANT SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR PREVIOUS PAYMENT, IF ANY, TO PLAINTIFF IN CONNECTION WITH THE SUBJECT PROJECT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF SANTOS, JOSELITO N.

MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY EFREN D. LUNAR IS GRANTED. THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR MAY PAY THE JUDGMENT AS FOLLOWS: PAY $250.00 OR MORE ON OR BEFORE MARCH 15, 2009 AND THEN $250.00 ON THE FIFTEENTH OF EACH MONTH UNTIL PAID IN FULL OR FUTHER COURT ORDER. DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED IN COURT FILE. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED FEB-02-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
